form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track beaten 15 m by Curly James (1:53.10) in NW30000L5 on March 23 at $8.48. Before that, 4th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track, beaten 15 m by Mossdale Ben (1:53.20) in NW31501L5 on March 16 at $16.18. In the mix from the inside draw.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into seventh behind Churchviewfrankl at this track over 1609m in a NW15000L5 on March 30 at $9.90. Raced better the start before that where he won by 5 m as favourite (Fr4) at this track (1:55.10) beating Coalford Topguy Gb in NW10000L5 on March 23 at $1.39. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track, beaten 35 m by Speaker Of Peace (1:53.30) in NW20041L5 on March 31 at $6.63. Respect.

form.formComment: Been racing well and showed plenty of improvement following March 23 run. Last start won by 1.5 m (Fr1) at this track (1:53.40) beating Six Degrees in NW15000L5 on March 30 at $5.37. This race will be harder than that win. Others have better credentials.
